column6: OA was conducted on Hirepro platform, total of 32 questions, among which 2 were coding questions which were to be solved in 40 minutes. Remainnig 30 questions were divided in two parts i.e. aptitude and basic technical questions with time restrictions on each section.
column7: One round of around 40 minutes, there were two panel members, it was mostly a discussion about the projects mentioned in the resume, the internships done followed by behavioral, HR and personal questions.

column6: Basic aptitude questions were asked and there were 2 coding questions, which were simple as well.

column6:
Online assessment was in two parts,
In first part there were mcq questions based on dbms, aptitude, computer network, some questions on cloud, oops. (level of questions was medium).
In second part there was coding round consist of two questions (questions was of easy level on topics like array and strings).
column7:
HR Round,
There were Scenario based questions mostly on how will handle things in a given situation.
They wanted to know how well you can handle things when you work as a team for any project. They were trying to understand one's situational awareness here. This round went for around 40 minutes and was easy to medium level.
column8: Questions were mostly related to projects.
